metadata.title: Skin Trade (Parisian Mix) [2010 Remaster]
metadata.lyrics:
[00:49.76] Working on the weekend, baby
[01:44.55] She's working all through the night
[01:49.96] A jump into the deep end gave her
[01:55.22] The evidence she required
[02:00.09] Takes five, she's got pearls
[02:05.73] Don't fake it when it comes to making money
[02:09.85] So she smiles, but that's cruel
[02:16.44] If you know what she thinks
[02:18.78] If you knew what she was after
[02:23.63] Sometimes she wonders
[02:26.42] And she laughs in her frustration
[02:32.34] Would someone please explain
[02:37.80] The reason for this strange behaviour?
[02:42.98] In exploitation's name
[02:48.47] We must be working for the skin trade
[02:53.14] 
[03:04.42] Doctors of the revolution gave us
[03:09.43] The medicine we desired
[03:14.72] Besides being absolutely painless
[03:19.71] It's a question of compromise
[03:24.99] They got steel, so cool
[03:30.51] To get angry at the weekend
[03:32.93] Then go back to school
[03:35.17] So big deal, it's what rules
[03:40.85] When it comes to making money
[03:43.72] Say yes, please, thank you
[03:48.32] Sometimes you wonder
[03:51.18] And you ask yourself the question
[03:57.19] Would someone please explain
[04:02.60] The reason for this strange behaviour?
[04:07.83] In exploitation's name
[04:13.26] We must be working for the skin trade
[04:18.36] Would someone please explain
[04:23.99] The reason for this strange behaviour?
[04:29.02] In exploitation's name
[04:34.48] We must be working for the skin trade
[04:39.33] 
[05:34.58] I know the answer
[05:37.36] But I'm asking you the question
[05:43.43] Would someone please explain
[05:47.26] 
[05:53.83] In exploitation's name
[05:59.34] We must be working for the skin trade
[06:04.57] Would someone please explain
[06:09.95] The reason for this strange behaviour?
[06:15.09] In exploitation's name
[06:20.58] We must be working for the skin trade
